build.buildCommand: npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build && echo '==> conteudo de dist:' && ls -la dist

deploy.startCommand: echo '==> procurando main.js em dist/:' && find dist -name 'main.js' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' && MAIN=$(find dist -name 'main.js' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' | head -1) && echo "==> iniciando: $MAIN" && node "$MAIN"
